samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divides a 16-bit number by an 8-bit number using combinatorial logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Combinatorial logic for division.</implementation>
    <task id="division_task">
        <description>Division task to compute quotient and remainder.</description>
        <inputs>
            <input id="a_reg" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend register.</input>
            <input id="b_reg" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor register.</input>
        </inputs>
        <outputs>
            <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
            <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
        </outputs>
        
        <variables>
            <variable id="quotient" width_description="[15:0]">Quotient variable.</variable>
            <variable id="remainder" width_description="[15:0]">Remainder variable.</variable>
            <variable id="count" width_description="[3:0]">Count variable.</variable>
        </variables>
        
        <implementation>
            // Initialize variables
            assign quotient = 16'd0;
            assign remainder = 16'd0;
            assign count = 4'd0;
            
            // Perform division operation
            always @(a_reg, b_reg) begin
                while(count < 16) begin
                    if(remainder >= b_reg) begin
                        quotient[count] = 1'b1;
                        remainder = remainder - b_reg;
                    end else begin
                        quotient[count] = 1'b0;
                    end
                    
                    remainder = remainder << 1;
                    remainder[0] = a_reg[15-count];
                    
                    count = count + 1;
                end
                
                return {quotient, remainder};
            end
        </implementation>
    </task>
    
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="result" value="{quotient, remainder}"/>
        <assign id="odd" value="{quotient, remainder}"/>
    </logic_description>
</module>
